name: massive
description: Massive financial data API plugin. Adds API knowledge, endpoint discovery, project scaffolding, and auto-configured MCP tools for building with Massive's REST and WebSocket APIs across equities, options, crypto, forex, indices, and futures.

interface.shortDescription: Financial data API for equities, options, crypto, forex, indices, futures
interface.longDescription: Adds API knowledge, endpoint discovery, project scaffolding, and auto-configured MCP tools for building with Massive's REST and WebSocket APIs. Includes five skills: scaffold new projects, discover endpoints, debug errors, build options strategies, and build Streamlit dashboards.
defaultPrompt: Use $scaffold to create a new Massive project
Use $discover to find the right Massive endpoint for your data need
Use $options to build an options strategy with Greeks
